title: ortizacalia austin-smithii
intro: Ortzacalia austin-smithii, also known as the Austin-Smith's ortzaca, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a type of shrub that is native to Mexico, and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be beneficial for reducing pain and fighting off infections. The leaves and roots of the plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems.
